metadata.description: Functions for calculating moving averages, rolling statistics, and time series aggregations

moving_average.description: Calculate moving averages for specified columns
moving_average.output_description: Function that calculates moving averages in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate moving averages for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 7)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Moving average method: 'simple', 'weighted', 'exponential' (default: 'simple')

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_ma')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving averages in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_variance.description: Calculate moving variance for specified columns
data_requirements: Sufficient data points for variance calculation
moving_variance.output_description: Function that calculates moving variance in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate moving variance for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 14)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_mv')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving variance in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_sum.output_description: Function that calculates moving sums in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate moving sums for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 7)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_ms')

moving_quantile.description: Calculate moving quantiles for specified columns
data_requirements: Sufficient data points for quantile calculation
moving_quantile.output_description: Function that calculates moving quantiles in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate moving quantiles for

required_params.name: quantile
required_params.description: Quantile to calculate (0-1)

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 20)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Quantile calculation method: 'linear', 'lower', 'higher', 'nearest', 'midpoint' (default: 'linear')

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_mq')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving quantiles in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_correlation.description: Calculate moving correlation between two columns
data_requirements: Sufficient data points for correlation calculation
moving_correlation.output_description: Function that calculates moving correlation in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: column1
required_params.description: First column for correlation

required_params.name: column2
required_params.description: Second column for correlation

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 20)

optional_params.name: method
optional_params.description: Correlation method: 'pearson', 'spearman', 'kendall' (default: 'pearson')

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_mcorr')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving correlation in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_zscore.description: Calculate moving z-scores for specified columns
data_requirements: Sufficient data points for z-score calculation
moving_zscore.output_description: Function that calculates moving z-scores in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate moving z-scores for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 20)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_mz')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving z-scores in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_apply_by_group.description: Apply custom functions to moving windows within groups
moving_apply_by_group.output_description: Function that applies custom functions to moving windows within groups in a MovingAggrPipe
examples: moving_apply_by_group('sales', lambda x: x.quantile(0.8), window=10, group_columns=['category'])

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to apply function to

required_params.name: func
required_params.description: Function to apply to each moving window

required_params.name: group_columns
required_params.description: Columns to group by before applying moving calculations

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 10)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_ma')

outputs.description: Function that applies custom functions to moving windows within groups in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_ratio.description: Calculate moving ratios between two columns
moving_ratio.output_description: Function that calculates moving ratios in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: numerator
required_params.description: Column name for numerator

required_params.name: denominator
required_params.description: Column name for denominator

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 7)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_mratio')

outputs.description: Function that calculates moving ratios in a MovingAggrPipe

detect_turning_points.description: Detect turning points in time series data
detect_turning_points.output_description: Function that detects turning points in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to detect turning points for

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for detection (default: 10)

optional_params.name: threshold
optional_params.description: Threshold for turning point detection (default: 0.05)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_tp')

outputs.description: Function that detects turning points in a MovingAggrPipe

moving_regression.output_description: Function that performs moving regression in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: x_column
required_params.description: Column name for x variable

required_params.name: y_column
required_params.description: Column name for y variable

optional_params.name: window
optional_params.description: Window size for moving calculations (default: 20)

optional_params.name: return_stats
optional_params.description: Whether to return regression statistics (default: False)

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations in window required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: center
optional_params.description: Set the labels at the center of the window (default: False)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_mreg')

outputs.description: Function that performs moving regression in a MovingAggrPipe

expanding_window.output_description: Function that calculates expanding window statistics in a MovingAggrPipe

required_params.name: columns
required_params.description: Column(s) to calculate expanding window statistics for

required_params.name: function
required_params.description: Function to apply: 'mean', 'sum', 'std', 'var', 'min', 'max', 'count'

optional_params.name: min_periods
optional_params.description: Minimum number of observations required to have a value (default: 1)

optional_params.name: time_column
optional_params.description: Column containing the time/date information for time-based windows (optional)

optional_params.name: group_columns
optional_params.description: Columns to group by before calculations (for panel data) (optional)

optional_params.name: output_suffix
optional_params.description: Suffix for output columns (default: '_exp')

outputs.description: Function that calculates expanding window statistics in a MovingAggrPipe
